column1: # agents.csv  --  one row per open-source agent integrated into unified_bench
#   agent       run-dir system tag (must match existing runs/ naming)
#   model       model tag used in run-dir name (qwen14b
#   langs       output languages the agent can emit
#   driver      path (relative to unified_bench ROOT) of the generation driver
#   out_flag    the flag this driver uses for the candidate output dir (--out or --cand_dir)
#   glob        glob that instrumented_final_eval.py uses to pick up candidates
#   confidence  observed = CLI seen in telemetry logs; inferred = ran per campaign table
# IMPORTANT: the 4 'observed' rows are taken verbatim from the A100 official5 telemetry
# (generation_resource.txt "Command being timed"). The 4 'inferred' rows ran in the
# campaign table but their exact CLI was not in the uploaded archive -- confirm the
# driver path + gen_args for those 4 before a full matrix run (one line each).
